dataList.name: Iron Maiden - Defibrillation
dataList.desc: Upon entry, хилит 30 IQ

dataList.name: Hunter's Mark
dataList.desc:
Every 3 turns, select a random enemy, reduce their Speed to 1, и target it with all of this unit's Skills
(If this effect could not be activated due to Stagger, activate it на следующий ход)

dataList.name: Undertake Prescript
dataList.desc:
Конец хода: If [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was executed this turn, хилит 15 IQ и получает [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] by ([UnlockBuff_Base] stage + 1) (Один раз за ход)

Конец хода: If [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was not executed this turn, получает 1 [PressureOfPrescript] и 5 [KarmaOfIndexStudent]
- If this unit does not have [UnlockBuff_Base], получает 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] в конце хода
- At 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], does not получает [KarmaOfIndexStudent]
- If this unit is under the effect of Effloresced[TabExplain] Э.Г.О::Procuration, double [KarmaOfIndexStudent] this unit will получает

dataList.name: Unlock
dataList.desc:
Конец хода: At 3/6/9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] или at 90%-/70%-/50%- ХП,
- Получает [UnlockBuff_1]/[UnlockBuff_2]/[UnlockBuff_3]
- Хилит to 45 IQ
- тратит все [PressureOfPrescript] и recover from Stagger
- Получает 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] in the turn after [UnlockBuff_Base] was gained for the first time

If [UnlockBuff_Base] was gained based on ХП conditional above,
- Получает [KarmaOfIndexStudent] by (sum of healed IQ / 15)
- Increase [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] to 3/6/9 if this unit had less than 3/6/9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy]; получает 1 [DefenseDown] и 2 [KarmaOfIndexStudent] на следующий ход за каждые [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] стаков gained

Min & макс. Speed +10 in the turn this unit uses its powerful attack

dataList.name: Concentration
dataList.desc:
At [UnlockBuff_3], apply the following effects:
- [BlandishmentShinEnemyDelete], получает Shield равный 50% of макс. ХП (lasts до конца битвы)
- Intensify [PressureOfPrescript] to [PressureOfPrescript_2nd] и макс. out its стаков
- Начало хода: Получает 1 [PressureOfPrescript_2nd]

dataList.name: Desperate Struggle
dataList.desc:
- Начало хода: Получает 3 [SupportProtect]
- When Опекун Большого wins a Clash, и uses an Attack against the target, follow up with "Colpi Sottani" as an Unopposed Attack against the same target (2 times per turn)
dataList.flavor:
'Maybe I can kill her now. Maybe this is my chance.'

Once again, the same contemplation comes to seize Lucio as he looms over his master, who lies fast asleep.
But this impulse remains an unactioned thought, for he had both fear born from experience и gratitude for his deliverance from the Backstreets.
Yet, his resentment runs too deep. Lucio makes a promise with himself, even as he swears utter fealty without a trace of deception:
'Once this battle is behind us, I will kill her. I will gouge out her other eye и stab и slash at her, again и again, until she no longer moves.'
For the first time, fire burns in the eyes of the boy whose body is covered in bruises.

dataList.name: Authority Unbroken
dataList.desc: Take -50% final урона if "Ученик Большого - Lucio" is on the field

dataList.name: The Eye of Precognition
dataList.desc:
When this unit enters the Encounter, получает 30 [FutureEyeOnMirror]
At 0 [FutureEyeOnMirror] стаков, convert [FutureEyeOnMirror] to [FutureEyeOffMirror]
dataList.flavor: This Relic, known as the Eye of Odin, is but a third of a whole Relic that was broken в three parts.

dataList.name: Accelerating Future
dataList.desc: In a Clash, получает 1 [LookingFuture] with every Clash Can получает up to ([FutureEyeOnMirror] стаков at Turn Start / 3) [LookingFuture] per turn While this unit has [FutureEyeOnMirror], getting attacked by Unopposed Attacks или losing a Clash activates the "Precognition" Skill
dataList.flavor: "The more we clash, the hotter my sword will become... и accelerate to bring us to the future I foresaw."

dataList.name: Overloaded
dataList.desc:
The following causes this unit toтеряет [FutureEyeOnMirror] стаков:
- If this unit fails to получает [LookingFuture], теряет 1 [FutureEyeOnMirror] with every Clash
- When this unit is attacked by an Unopposed Attack, теряет 1 [FutureEyeOnMirror]
- On Clashтеряет, теряет 3 [FutureEyeOnMirror]
dataList.flavor: 'The eye's heating up, its socket is starting to ache, и my vision is turning red.'

dataList.name: La Spada di Palermo
dataList.desc:
Deal +15% more урона against Shields за каждые Burn на главной цели (макс. 300%)
On Skill Use, if target's Attack Skill is either a Slash или a Pierce Skill, Сила клеша +1
If this unit's Skill effects triggered [VibrationExplosion], получает 2 [AttackDmgUp] на следующий ход (3 times per turn)
If this unit hit Critically with its Skill effects, хилит 5 IQ

dataList.name: The Shame of Famiglia Bognatelli
dataList.desc:
Take -30% ХП, IQ урона from [Combustion], <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчупа</noparse></link></u></color>, <sprite name="Burst"><color=#e30000><u><link="Burst"><noparse>Зелёнки</noparse></link></u></color> , <sprite name="Sinking"><color=#e30000><u><link="Sinking"><noparse>Депрессии</noparse></link></u></color> ; -30% to Stagger Threshold raised by [Vibration]
At 1+ [AccelBullet], Skills that spend [AccelBullet] deal +30% урона и deal +150% урона against Shields
Получает 4  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> за каждые [AccelBullet] spent
When flipping a Coin that spends [AccelBullet], does not cancel the attack even if this unit does not have Acceleration Round
dataList.flavor:
"You were an inheritor of the Palermitan style и a wielder of our family heirloom—you had every privilege one could ever hope for. How dare you embarrass yourself like this?"
"We'll let you keep the Relic и the sword, for they have been defiled by your dishonorable stench."
"To be promoted to the station of a Sottocapo, an Underboss... only to be ousted in a mere 3 days. No one else has suffered such pathetic humiliation apart from you, Valencina."
"You are the shame of our family. La Famiglia Bognatelli withdraws its love from you."

dataList.name: Shin (心) - Valencina
dataList.desc: When hit, или when "Ученик Большого - Lucio" is defeated, получает [ObsessionAndGreed] на следующий ход
dataList.flavor: "*sigh* Okay. So, you're saying we can get Ticket back by going in и wrecking the place according to that fanatic's plan... Is this really going to bring Ticket back to us?"

dataList.name: Lucio, you useless little shit!
dataList.desc: When "Ученик Большого - Lucio" is defeated, activate "Time to Hunt" Passive

dataList.name: Time to Hunt
dataList.desc:
Начало хода: If this unit is Staggered, recover from Stagger

Select a random Sinner и наносит [TeachersPrey]
- Activates every 4 turns after the initial activation
- If this unit kills the target with the Skill "Disposal," activate it again на следующий ход
dataList.flavor:
The Palermitan Style has much in common with the originator of the sword technique—La Famiglia Bognatelli.
Both the Famiglia и the sword style are renowned for relentlessly focusing on a single prey during a hunt, which is concluded with a Coup de Grâce that may as well be called a dissection. These executions are not carried out in the shadows, but instead, proudly put on display for all to behold.
The spectacular и formidable sword style has granted the Famiglia much honor и prestige, eventually securing them a place among the Sette Famiglie of the Backstreets.
Valencina, a master of the Palermitan Style, used it to hunt и execute many officers и so-called battle-hardened soldiers during the Smoke War, becoming a veritable "War Hero."
Ironically, no one could have imagined her fall would sink as low as her fame once soared.

dataList.name: Vengeance Tattoos [<s>Great Brother</s>]
dataList.desc:
Takes -30% урона from [Combustion], <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчупа</noparse></link></u></color>, [Vibration], и <sprite name="Burst"><color=#e30000><u><link="Burst"><noparse>Зелёнки</noparse></link></u></color>  (округляется вниз)
-50% to the amount of Stagger Threshold raised (округляется вниз)

dataList.name: The Book of Vengeance
dataList.desc:
Encounter Start: Наносит [VengeanceBookSpider] on all Sinners

If this unit hit with more than 3 Skills this turn, получает 1 [ReinforcedTattooSpider] на следующий ход за каждые excess Skill that hit

dataList.name: My Daughter's Education
dataList.desc:
При победе в клеше, получает 1 [DaughterEducationSpider]

On Hit with a Skill, получает 1 [DaughterEducationSpider] (once per Skill; this effect does not activate for Cracked Coins)

При победе в клеше with the first-used Skill in a turn, получает 1 more [DaughterEducationSpider] и the Skill gains Сила монет +1

dataList.name: Resentment
dataList.desc:
When hit by 2 Skills, получает 1 [ResentmentSpider] итеряет 1 [DaughterEducationSpider] (number of hits taken is always tracked)

At макс. [ResentmentSpider] стаков, use a powerful attack

Конец хода: при менее чем 90% / 60% / 40% ХП, макс. out this unit's [ResentmentSpider] стаков

dataList.name: Vengeance Tattoos макс. Output... Unseal Строительный паяльник!
dataList.desc: When [MiddleFatherSwordFour] is unsealed, this unit gains [MiddleFatherGutsMirror]

dataList.name: Am I doing this right, Papa?!
dataList.desc:
Begins Encounter with [HeatingWireOffSpider]

Начало хода: At 3+ [GotACompliment], получает [HeatingWireOnSpider] и also наносит [Combustion] with Skills that наносит <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчупа</noparse></link></u></color>
- Конец хода: при менее чем 3 [GotACompliment], convert this unit's [HeatingWireOnSpider] to [HeatingWireOffSpider]

If "Опекун Среднего - Matthias" has [MiddleFatherSwordFour], this unit does not enter [HeatingWireOffSpider] state
dataList.flavor: "I like my papa because he always praises me и buys me comic books."

dataList.name: The Middle Styled Tattoos
dataList.desc: If this unit hit with more than 2 Skills, получает 1 [ReinforcedTattooSpiderDaughter] на следующий ход за каждые excess Skill that hit
dataList.flavor: 'Will the bigger Sisters и Brothers of the Middle accept me as their family one day, so I can continue to live with them?'

dataList.name: Praise is the Wind in Her Sail
dataList.desc:
При победе в клеше, получает 1 [GotACompliment]

On Hit with a Skill, получает 1 [GotACompliment] (once per Skill; this effect does not activate for Cracked Coins)

При победе в клеше with the first-used Skill in a turn, получает 1 more [GotACompliment] и the Skill gains Сила монет +1

dataList.name: I'm pretty sure the Middle never forgets
dataList.desc:
When hit by 2 Skills, получает 1 [ResentmentSpiderDaughter] итеряет 1 [GotACompliment] (number of hits taken is always tracked)

At макс. [ResentmentSpiderDaughter] стаков, use a powerful attack

Конец хода: при менее чем 80% / 60% / 40% ХП, макс. out this unit's [ResentmentSpiderDaughter] стаков

dataList.name: Риен, Опекун Указательного
dataList.desc: Take -50% урона from Unopposed Attacks Take -50% урона from [Combustion], Кетчупа, [Vibration], Зелёнки , и Депрессии When healing IQ from [UnlockBuff_Base], if this unit's IQ is below 15, хилит IQ up to 15 Encounter Start: Получает [BurningWoundRien_Mask] и хилит IQ up to 30 At 55%- ХП, end the turn и получает a new pattern - Remove all effects other than those exclusive этому юниту - при менее чем 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill], change [StackRienSpecialSkill] стаков to 9
dataList.flavor:
I waited for "the moment" as the Prescript told me to.
Even after my darling daughter left, I waited.

And after a while, I was contacted by Limbus Company, и saw that the Backdoor was open.
That's when the device beeped и let me know that it was finally time to bring my daughter home.

dataList.name: Oracle Device [Caduceus]
dataList.desc: A random weapon is assigned to every Coin. Each weapon has a unique effect. - [RienWeapon01Hatchet] - [RienWeapon02Stiletto] - [RienWeapon03Greatsword] - [RienWeapon04Rapier] - [RienWeapon05Sledgehammer] - [RienWeapon06Ultragreatsword] - [RienWeapon07Lance] - [RienWeapon08Chain] - [RienWeapon09Scythe] When using an Attack Skill, получает 1 [StackRienSpecialSkill] (макс. 9) - Can be gained once per Skill; does not получает стаков from the same Skill twice Начало хода: At 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill] Stacks, use a powerful Skill - Attack End: After using the powerful Skill for the first time, получает [Shin_Rien] - Reset the per-Skill [StackRienSpecialSkill] cap - Min & макс. Speed +15 - Конец хода: Получает 1 [Vulnerable] и 2 [ResultReduction] на следующий ход Turn 3 Start: при менее чем 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill], bring its стаков to 9; then, получает (стаков gained x 3) [KarmaOfIndexRien] - Then, activate this effect every 3 turns
dataList.flavor:
A vial of what looks like liquid metal capable of changing its shape и mass, its qualities almost like those of Singularities, swishes inside the Device.
The form the fluid takes is contingent on the Prescript the Device receives. The weapons it produces depend on the information regarding the target и the time limit given to carry out the assassination.
One day, as he received a dagger too small for the task, he elected to wait until it produced a different weapon. However, despite the approaching deadline, it refused to provide him a proper weapon; he had no choice but to kill his target with a fork.

dataList.name: Will of the Prescript
dataList.desc: Начало хода: - Получает [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] based on [UnlockBuff_Base] stage на себе - Apply [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] against a random Sinner, и prioritize attacking them - When using a Skill against [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality], convert all Coins on that Skill to [SuperCoin:*Вечные монеты*] When attacking, if [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] is killed, или if this unit can no longer attack that target, use the remaining Skills against a random other Sinner - Prioritizes targets with the least current ХП, unless they have 1 ХП - When the randomly chosen Sinner is killed, или if the said Sinner's ХП is brought down to 1, repeat this effect on another Sinner Deal +2.5% урона against [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] за каждые [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (макс. 20%) - At 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], deal +30% урона against all targets
dataList.flavor:
Do you wish me to raise a family?

"It must've been fate that brought us together. To think that I'd ever meet a husband like you..."

dataList.name: Undertake Prescript
dataList.desc: Конец хода: If [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was executed this turn, хилит 10 IQ и получает 3 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (один раз за ход) Конец хода: If [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was not executed this turn, получает 8 [KarmaOfIndexRien] - If this unit does not have [UnlockBuff_Base], получает 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] в конце хода - At 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], does not получает [KarmaOfIndexRien]
dataList.flavor:
Do you wish me toтеряет my family?

"Honey, I gotta take a quick trip up north today."
"Ah, also—hey, buddy. I'm expecting a package this afternoon, so would you be a dear и pick it up for me, sweetheart?"

dataList.name: Unlock
dataList.desc:
Конец хода: At 3/6/9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] или at 95%-/85%-/75%- ХП,
- Получает [UnlockBuff_Rien1]/[UnlockBuff_Rien2]/[UnlockBuff_Rien3]

Turn 1 End: At lower than [UnlockBuff_Base] stage 1, получает [UnlockBuff_Rien1]
Turn 2 End: At lower than [UnlockBuff_Base] stage 2, получает [UnlockBuff_Rien2]

When gaining [UnlockBuff_Base] for the first time, if this unit's IQ is below 15, хилит up to 15 IQ

When [UnlockBuff_Base] is activated due to ХП или Turn conditionals:
- при менее чем 3/6/9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] стаков, raise the стаков to 3/6/9 и получает 5 [KarmaOfIndexRien] at the на следующий ход Start за каждые стаков gained
dataList.flavor: "Following the Prescripts is to unlock what is locked."

dataList.name: Риен, the Father [Imitation]
dataList.desc: Take -75% урона from Unopposed Attacks Take -75% урона from [Combustion], Кетчупа, [Vibration], Зелёнки , и Депрессии When healing IQ from [UnlockBuff_Base], if this unit's IQ is below 15, хилит up to 15 IQ When this unit enters a new phase at 55% ХП, получает the following effects: - Remove all effects other than those exclusive этому юниту - Получает [IndexPrescript_RienSecondPhase] - Convert [BurningWoundRien_Mask] to [BurningWoundRien] - Convert [KarmaOfIndexRien] to [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase]; then получает 10 Stacks of that effect - If this unit does not have [Shin_Rien], immediately получает that effect At 25% или lower ХП, получает a new pattern и greatly enhance a certain Skill
dataList.flavor:
Once, he harbored a suspicion that he was being shaped в an imitation of someone; he doubted the Will и nearly defied it, for he did not know whom he was to mimic. Only when it was too late did he understand its intent и come to accept the Prescript's will.
Only then was the false father completed.

dataList.name: Oracle Device [Caduceus] - Full Unlock
dataList.desc: A random weapon is assigned to every Coin. Each weapon has a unique effect. - [RienWeapon01Hatchet2phase] - [RienWeapon02Stiletto2phase] - [RienWeapon03Greatsword2phase] - [RienWeapon04Rapier2phase] - [RienWeapon05Sledgehammer2phase] - [RienWeapon06Ultragreatsword2phase] - [RienWeapon07Lance2phase] - [RienWeapon08Chain2phase] - [RienWeapon09Scythe2phase] When using an Attack Skill, получает 1 [StackRienSpecialSkill] (макс. 9) - Can be gained once per Skill; does not получает стаков from the same Skill twice - Does not получает стаков from a Skill used only in a special pattern Начало хода: At 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill] Stacks, use a powerful Skill - Reset the per-Skill [StackRienSpecialSkill] cap - Min & макс. Speed +15 - Конец хода: Получает 2 [Vulnerable] и 3 [ResultReduction] на следующий ход Activate the following, starting from the turn in which the phase changed - Every 3 turns, при менее чем 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill], bring its стаков to 9; then, получает (стаков gained x 5) [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase]
dataList.flavor: An unparalleled weapon и a curse bestowed by Hermes, a god of the City whose Prescripts are distributed by radio waves.

dataList.name: Will of the Prescript
dataList.desc: Начало хода: - Apply [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] against a random Sinner, и prioritize attacking them - When using a Skill against [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality], convert all Coins on that Skill to [SuperCoin:*Вечные монеты*] - Получает [Protection] равный [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (макс. 9) · Теряет 1 стаков за каждые 20 [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase] When attacking, if [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] is killed, или if this unit can no longer attack that target, use the remaining Skills against a random other Sinner - Prioritizes targets with the least current ХП, unless they have 1 ХП - When the randomly chosen Sinner is killed, или if the said Sinner's ХП is brought down to 1, repeat this effect on another Sinner Deal +5% урона against [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] за каждые [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (макс. 40%) - At 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], deal +50% урона against all targets Starting from the first turn after the phase change, activate the following effects: - Начало хода: Получает [BlackNightmare] · If this unit used a powerful attack в прошлом ходу, теряет [BlackNightmare] for that turn - When gaining [BlackNightmare], Если у этого юнита есть fewer than 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill] Stacks, activate a unique pattern
dataList.flavor:
I raised a family.

"You're not supposed to be here right now."
"My work is still much underway, и I'd like to carve them up in peace so they can attain the most exquisite beauty I can sculpt."
"... Don't tell me, are you here to defy the Prescript?"

dataList.name: Undertake Prescript
dataList.desc: Конец хода: If [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was executed this turn, хилит 15 IQ и получает 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (один раз за ход) Конец хода: If [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was not executed this turn, получает 8 [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase] итеряет 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] - If this unit used a powerful Skill this turn, получает 12 [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase] итеряет 2 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] instead
dataList.flavor:
I... lost my family.

"Don't go..."
"Don't go... Not... like this... Daddy... Please... help us..."

dataList.name: All of My Corpus has been Given to Tibia
dataList.desc:
Take -30% ХП, IQ урона from [Combustion], [Vibration], <sprite name="Burst"><color=#e30000><u><link="Burst"><noparse>Зелёнки</noparse></link></u></color> , и <sprite name="Sinking"><color=#e30000><u><link="Sinking"><noparse>Депрессии</noparse></link></u></color>

Начало хода: If this unit is Staggered, recover from Stagger. Afterward, получает 2 [CrimsonTakeDamageUp] и becomes unable to use 'Installation Art no. 3: Improvised Ribcage' until на следующий ход (один раз за бой)

Конец хода: Получает 1 [DefenseDown] на следующий ход за каждые 4 [Combustion] на себе (макс. 15)

dataList.name: Allow Me to Briefly Enjoy My Pupil's Exhibition

dataList.name: Visitors Must Respect the Rules of the Gallery
dataList.desc: Если у этого юнита есть [SupportProtect], теряет 1 [SupportProtect] on Clash Start (once per Skill)

dataList.name: With this Artwork, I will Prove Myself before the Maestro
dataList.desc: при менее чем 20 IQ when Опекун Безымянного enters the Encounter, хилит IQ to 20

dataList.name: Please, Do Stop Running и Be Seated
dataList.desc: Конец хода: Наносит [RedemptionTheRings] на следующий ход to the Sinner with the fastest Speed
